title: Sub items kanaban view

posts.author: Yariv (Yariv Cohen)
posts.cookedHtml:
we are a startup that uses monday for our sprints management.

We put every sprint as a group and within the group we split items to sub-sprints.

Thus, the actual tasks are in the sub items of each item, but here is the thing: there’s NO Kanaban view that shows sub items !!

Of course we can change the board structure but that would cause other issues…

So frustrating! How come there’s no Kanaban view option of sub items (under the item’s kana an) ?

Really can’t understand it.

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Yariv,

Subitems are currently supported in the Kanban view, however it sounds like not in the way you’d prefer.

Screen Shot 2024-04-02 at 2.59.05 pm1182×429 41.7 KB

Would you be happy to elaborate on how you’d like to have the subitems formatted so I can share this feedback with our team internally?

posts.author: bade (Mikada)
posts.cookedHtml:
@Yariv

You can use Subitem Kanban for the issue.
It allows you to manage your subitems in a kanban view. Group them according to their status and update status by just drag and drop.
